title: Error workflow not triggering on workflow failures
symptom: The error handling workflow does not get triggered when other workflows fail, leading to no error message being displayed.
not_this_if: Catching errors with IF or Error Trigger nodes
root_cause: In n8n Cloud, the error workflow only triggers when an execution ends in an actual error. If any node has 'Continue On Fail' enabled or if errors are caught manually, the execution is considered successful, preventing the error workflow from being called.
fix_steps: Disable 'Continue On Fail' on the nodes being tested
Remove any manual error catching logic
Run the main workflow via its real trigger
Ensure the execution status becomes Failed
agent_instruction: Disable 'Continue On Fail' and remove manual error catching, then run the workflow normally.
